characters.name: Mong
characters.description: MongAffiliationGreedyOccupationVillainBiographical informationDate of birthNovember 9, 2000Place of birthMapleberryDate of deathNovember 12, 2000Place of death???Physical descriptionSpeciesMouseGenderMaleEye colorBlackAppearancesPortrayed byAmos CrawleyMong the mouse is the main antagonist from Elliot Moose,he is an con-artist and inventor mouse who is often greedy. mong is a stuffed that has a small and chubby body,he also has green eyes and a button nose. he wears a white collar with an aqua green bow tie,at the end of the episodes when he tries to escape from elliot and his friends,he uses a black bowler hat with a yellow helicopter blade to escape. in most episodes,mong is always wearing a disguise in a attempt to deceive and trick the protagonists,in particular,he always dresses up according to his crime,for example dress up as mouse-putin the wizard inSleeping Socks.
